name: flamapy-fm

metadata.name: flamapy-fm
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: flamapy-fm is a plugin to Flamapy module

documentation:
# fm_metamodel

This repo host the feature model concrete classes


## Install for development

```
pip install -e .
```

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.transformations.featureide_writer.prettify
documentation: Return a pretty-printed XML string for the Element.

class_variables.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.transformations.clafer_writer.ClaferAttributeType.FLOAT
documentation: Be careful: In clafer theres is also a 'real' primitive type.

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.transformations.clafer_writer.ClaferWriter
documentation: Transform a feature model to a Clafer format.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.transformations.glencoe_reader.GlencoeReader._parse_tree
documentation: Parse the tree structure and returns the root feature.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.get_new_ctc_name
documentation:
Return a new name for a constraint (based on the provided prefix) that is not already
in the given list of constraints' names.
This is a list of ultils to work with constraints

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.left_right_features_from_simple_constraint
documentation:
Return the names of the features involved in a simple constraint.

A simple constraint can be a requires constraint or an excludes constraint.
A requires constraint can be represented in the AST of the constraint with one of the
following structures:
    A requires B
    A => B
    !A v B
An excludes constraint can be represented in the AST of the constraint with one of the
following structures:
    A excludes B
    A => !B
    !A v !B

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.split_constraint
documentation: Given a constraint, split it in multiple constraints separated by the AND operator.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.split_formula
documentation: Given a formula, returns a list of formulas separated by the AND operator.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Feature.get_children
documentation: Direct children of the feature regardless the relation type.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.get_features
documentation: List of features' names involved in the constraint.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_simple_constraint
documentation: Return true if the constraint is a simple constraint (requires or excludes).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_complex_constraint
documentation:
Return true if the constraint is a complex constraint
(i.e., it is not a simple constraint).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_requires_constraint
documentation: Return true if the constraint is a requires constraint.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_excludes_constraint
documentation: Return true if the constraint is an excludes constraint.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_pseudocomplex_constraint
documentation:
Return true if the constraint is a pseudo-complex constraint
(i.e., it can be transformed to a set of simple constraints).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.models.feature_model.Constraint.is_strictcomplex_constraint
documentation:
Return true if the constraint is a strict-complex constraint
(i.e., it cannot be transformed to a set of simple constraints).

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.interfaces.variation_points.VariationPoints
documentation:
The variation points of a feature model are those features that require to make a choice
(i.e., select a variant).

This operation returns the variation points and the variants of each variation point.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.transformations.json_reader.parse_tree
documentation: Parse the tree structure and returns the root feature.

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_max_depth_tree.FMMaxDepthTree
documentation: This operation returns the maximum depth of the feature model tree.

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_leaf_features.FMLeafFeatures
documentation:
This operation returns the list of features that are leaves of the feature model tree
(i.e., they have not children).

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_core_features.FMCoreFeatures
documentation:
Core features are features that are present in all configurations of the feature model.

This implementation assumes that:
    (1) there are not any dead-features in the model.
    (2) there are not any false-optional features in the model.

These assumptions imply that there are not any cross-tree constraints
involving the core features, otherwise the model would contain:
    dead-features (e.g., for 'excludes' constraints) and
    false-optional features (e.g., for 'requires' constraints).

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_feature_ancestors.FMFeatureAncestors
documentation:
This operation returns the list of ancestors of a given feature
(i.e., all parents recursively up to the root feature).

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_average_branching_factor.FMAverageBranchingFactor
documentation:
The average branching factor is the average of branches in the feature model.

The number of branches is the number of features that have at least one child.

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_estimated_configurations_number.FMEstimatedConfigurationsNumber
documentation:
It computes an estimation of the number of products of the feature model.

It only uses the structure of the feature model,
without taking into account the cross-tree constraints,
and thus, the number is an upper limit of the real number of products.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_generate_random_attribute.get_random_value_from_domain
documentation:
Generate a random value from a domain.
NOTE: This is not uniform if there are more than one range or a range and a list of elements.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_generate_random_attribute.get_random_value_from_ranges
documentation:
Generate a random value from a list of ranges.
NOTE: This is not uniform if there are more than one range.

classes.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_generate_random_attribute.GenerateRandomAttribute
documentation:
This operation generate random values for a given attribute and set the attribute for all
features in the model.

functions.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.metric_method
documentation:
Decorator to mark a method as a metric method.
It has the value of the measure, it can also have a size and a ratio.
Example:
    property name: Abstract Features.
    description: The description of the property
    value (optional): the list of abstract features.
    size (optional): the length of the list.
    ratio (optional): the percentage of abstract features with regards the total
    number of features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.constraints_per_features
documentation: Auxiliary methods

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.features
documentation: Set of features in the feature model.
List of methods that returns a feature

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.abstract_features
documentation:
Features used to structure the feature model that, however, do not have any
impact at implementation level.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.concrete_features
documentation: Features that are mapped to at least one implementation artifact.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.leaf_features
documentation: Features that have not subfeatures (aka 'primitive features' or 'terminal features').

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.compound_features
documentation: Features that have subfeatures.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.concrete_compound_features
documentation: Concrete and compound features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.concrete_leaf_features
documentation: Concrete and leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.abstract_compound_features
documentation: Abstract and compound features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.abstract_leaf_features
documentation: Abstract and leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.tree_relationships
documentation: Number of relationships (edges) of the feature model.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.root_feature
documentation: The root of the feature model.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.top_features
documentation: Features that are first descendants of the root.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.solitary_features
documentation: Features that are not grouped in a feature group.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.grouped_features
documentation: Features that occurs in a feature group.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.mandatory_features
documentation: Features marked as mandatory that need to be selected if its parent is selected.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.optional_features
documentation: Feature marked as optional.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.feature_groups
documentation: Features that express a choice over the grouped features in a group.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.alternative_groups
documentation:
Feature groups that require the selection of just one child (i.e., [1..1]
cardinality).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.or_groups
documentation:
Feature groups that require the selection of at least one child (i.e., [1..*]
cardinality).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.mutex_groups
documentation:
Feature groups that require the selection of zero or just one child (i.e.,
[0..1] cardinality).

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.cardinality_groups
documentation:
Feature groups with arbitrary cardinality [a..b] that require the selection
of a minimum and a maximum number of children.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.branching_factor
documentation: Average number of children per non-leaf feature (aka 'Ratio of Variability').

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.min_children_per_feature
documentation: Minimal number of children per non-leaf feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.max_children_per_feature
documentation: Maximal number of children per feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.avg_children_per_feature
documentation: Average number of children per feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.depth_tree
documentation: Number of features of the longest path from the root to the leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.max_depth_tree
documentation: Number of features of the longest path from the root to the leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.mean_depth_tree
documentation: Number of features of the mean path from the root to the leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.median_depth_tree
documentation: Number of features of the median path from the root to the leaf features.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.cross_tree_constraints
documentation: Textual cross-tree constraints.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.simple_constraints
documentation: Requires and Excludes constraints.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.requires_constraints
documentation:
Constraints modeling that the activation of a feature f1 implies the
activation of a feature f2.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.excludes_constraints
documentation:
Constraints modeling that two features are mutually exclusive and cannot be
activated together.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.complex_constraints
documentation: Constraints in arbitrary propositional logic formulae.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.pseudo_complex_constraints
documentation: Constraints that are convertible to a set of simple constraints.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.strict_complex_constraints
documentation: Constraints that cannot be converted to a set of simple constraints.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.min_constraints_per_feature
documentation: The minimal number of constraints per feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.max_constraints_per_feature
documentation: The maximal number of constraints per feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.avg_constraints_per_feature
documentation: The average number of constraints per feature.

methods.name: flamapy.metamodels.fm_metamodel.operations.fm_metrics.FMMetrics.extra_constraint_representativeness
documentation:
Features involved in cross-tree constraints. The ratio to the total number of
features is called 'Extra constraint representativeness (ECR)'.
